armorFormula.desc:: Armor damage reduction formula, calculates the damage after armor, result is the new damage. Default formula, which is adjusted for modpacks:damage*(15/(armor+15))
armorFormula.armor: Input value, which gets replaced with the entities armor value
armorFormula.damage: Input value, which gets replaced with the incoming damage value

toughnessFormula.desc:: Armor toughness reduces damage in relation to percent health lost, result is the new damage. Default: damage*(1/(toughness/10+1)*hitpct+(1-hitpct))
toughnessFormula.toughness: Input value, which gets replaced with the entities armor toughness value
toughnessFormula.damage: Input value, which gets replaced with the incoming damage value, reduced by armor before
toughnessFormula.hitpct: Input value, which gets replaced with the percentage of entity max health the incoming damage would take(0.0-1.0)

protectionFormula.desc:: Protection enchantment formula, calculates the damage after protection enchantments, result is the new damage. Default formula equals vanilla formula, which results in 4% damage reduction per protectionlevel capped at 80%. Default formula:damage*(1.0-(MIN(MAX(protectionlevel, 0), 20.0))/25.0)
protectionFormula.protectionlevel: Input value, which gets replaced with sum of all protectionlevels, see below
protectionFormula.damage: Input value, which gets replaced with the incoming damage value

protectionLevels.desc:: Sets the amount of protection level a protection enchantment does give, per enchantment level. By default these are vanilla levels, you can add modded protection enchant ids aswell.

playerdamageFormula.desc:: Player damage normalization formula, scales player damage caused to better balance modded weapons and combat, result is the new damage. To disable scaling put just: damage Default formula:damage*(100/(damage+100))
playerdamageFormula.damage: Input value, which gets replaced with the incoming damage value

debugprint.desc:: Set to true to enable log debug output, default: false.
